# MINISHELL PASSED TESTS REPORT
# Generated by: full PTY interactive bash comparison (93 tests total)
# Reference: bash --noprofile --norc -i via PTY
# Passed: 50

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## echo_basic
inputs: ['echo hello world', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello world

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## echo_n_flag
inputs: ['echo -n hello', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello (no newline)

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## echo_nnn_flag
inputs: ['echo -nnn hello', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello (no newline)

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## echo_single_quote_dollar
inputs: ["echo '$HOME'", 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: $HOME

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## echo_double_quote_expand
inputs: ['echo "$HOME"', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: /root

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pwd_basic
inputs: ['pwd', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: /home/claude or cwd

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## cd_home
inputs: ['cd', 'pwd', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: /root

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## cd_dotdot
inputs: ['cd /tmp', 'cd ..', 'pwd', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: /

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## cd_bad_exit1
inputs: ['cd /nonexistent_xyz_42', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 1

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## export_new_var
inputs: ['export MYVAR=42', 'echo $MYVAR', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 42

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## unset_var
inputs: ['export FOO=bar', 'unset FOO', 'echo $FOO', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## exit_0
inputs: ['exit 0']
exit_code: 0
output: 

----------------------------------------------------------------------

inputs: ['exit 42']
exit_code: 42
output:

exit_code: 255
output:

inputs: ['exit 256']
exit_code: 0
output: 

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## exit_neg1_wraps
inputs: ['exit -1']
exit_code: 255
output: 

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## expand_last_exit_true
inputs: ['true', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 0

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## expand_last_exit_false
inputs: ['false', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 1

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## expand_single_quote
inputs: ["echo '$USER'", 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: $USER

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## expand_double_quote_var
inputs: ['export X=hello', 'echo "$X world"', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello world

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_simple
inputs: ['echo hello | cat', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_three_stages
inputs: ['echo hello | cat | cat', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_grep
inputs: ['echo hello | grep hell', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_5_stages
inputs: ['echo a | cat | cat | cat | cat', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: a

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_20_stages
inputs: ['echo start | cat | cat | ...(20 total)', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: start

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_false_exit_status
inputs: ['false | true', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 0

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_grep_exit_code
inputs: ['echo notfound | grep xyz', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 1

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## redir_out
inputs: ['echo hello > /tmp/out.txt', 'cat /tmp/out.txt', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## redir_append
inputs: ['echo line1 > /tmp/app.txt', 'echo line2 >> /tmp/app.txt', 'cat /tmp/app.txt', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: line1
line2

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## redir_in
inputs: ['echo hello > /tmp/in.txt', 'cat < /tmp/in.txt', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## redir_in_out_combo
inputs: ['echo foo > /tmp/io.txt', 'cat < /tmp/io.txt > /tmp/out2.txt', 'cat /tmp/out2.txt', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: foo

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## redir_overwrite
inputs: ['echo first > /tmp/over.txt', 'echo second > /tmp/over.txt', 'cat /tmp/over.txt', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: second

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## redir_to_devnull
inputs: ['echo hi > /dev/null', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 0

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## pipe_redir_combo
inputs: ['echo hello | cat > /tmp/pr.txt', 'cat /tmp/pr.txt', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## heredoc_basic_via_stdin
inputs: ['cat << EOF', 'hello', 'EOF', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
note: works via stdin pipe; PTY harness limitation
output: hello

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## heredoc_var_expand
inputs: ['export X=42', 'cat << EOF', '$X', 'EOF', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
note: works via stdin pipe
output: 42

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## heredoc_quoted_delim_no_expand
inputs: ["cat << 'EOF'", '$HOME', 'EOF', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
note: quoted delim suppresses expansion
output: $HOME

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## empty_line_noop
inputs: ['', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## spaces_only_noop
inputs: ['   ', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## dollar_question_true
inputs: ['true', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 0

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## dollar_question_false
inputs: ['false', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 1

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## exit_status_pipe_last
inputs: ['true | false', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 1

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## quoted_spaces_preserved
inputs: ['echo "  hello  world  "', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output:   hello  world  

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## backslash_in_single_quote
inputs: ["echo 'a\\nb'", 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: a\nb

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## export_special_val
inputs: ["export V='hello world'", 'echo $V', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: hello world

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## unset_nonexistent_ok
inputs: ['unset NEVER_EXISTED_VAR_XYZ', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 0

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## cd_tilde
inputs: ['cd ~', 'pwd', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: /root

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## multi_redir_last_wins
inputs: ['echo test > /tmp/m1.txt > /tmp/m2.txt', 'cat /tmp/m2.txt', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: test

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## path_empty
inputs: ['export PATH=', 'ls', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: ./minishell: ls: No such file or directory

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## ambiguous_redirect
inputs: ['unset X', 'echo hi > $X', 'echo $?', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: |
	minishell: ambiguous redirect
	1

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## long_line_4096
inputs: ['echo ', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: 

----------------------------------------------------------------------
## env_spaces_var
inputs: ["export SPACED='a b c'", 'echo $SPACED', 'exit']
exit_code: 0
output: a b c
